negative: fine intricate detail that vanishes at small sizes
clusters of tiny sparkles, dots or particles that read as noise on a phone
noise, grain or gritty texture beyond the knit stitch pattern itself
washed-out pastel or muddy desaturated colors
thin wire-like lines or black outlines
loose fraying fibers, fuzz halos or flyaway strands around silhouettes
text or letters unless the description explicitly requests them
extra objects or filled empty space beyond the described subject

phrases.finish: plush knitted-yarn finish: every surface reads as chunky hand-knit wool with a CLEAN, LARGE stitch pattern (big V-shaped knit stitches, 4-8 stitches across the object, never fine weave); soft matte fibers with gentle sheen on stitch ridges; colors stay saturated and pure; decorative particles rationed: at most one or two LARGE felt flowers or buttons, never confetti clouds
phrases.lighting: single warm key light from the top with soft highlights on stitch ridges, gentle ambient occlusion between stitches and in crevices, and a soft round contact shadow directly beneath the object
phrases.rendering: premium mobile casual-game UI asset in a cozy AMIGURUMI / KNITTED CRAFT style, DESIGNED FOR SMALL PHONE SCREENS: it must read instantly at 48px — one big simple form, oversized stitch texture, exaggerated key feature, strong tonal contrast; hand-crafted toy-photography warmth baked onto clean rounded volumes, bold chunky silhouette
phrases.shape: rounded, plump, hand-stuffed silhouettes like crocheted toys (never sterile geometry); smooth rounded outer edges with a few bold internal details; every object closed by a thin outline in a darker shade of its own yarn color (never black); centered single subject with generous breathing room

sources: hand-corrected 2026-07-17 from pixelsmith ingest of games/wool_crush/refs/art (menu-132, gameplay-8/20, win-120, fail-476, settings-128, other-144); knitted amigurumi identity read directly off the App Store frames: knit chevron dragon, wound yarn spools, purl-textured slide tiles, knit-field backdrop with stitched track, felt flowers, paw-coin currency
